name: CSW INDUSTRIALS, INC.
business: CSW Industrials, Inc. is a diversified industrial growth company that provides niche, value-added products including mechanical products for HVAC/R, plumbing, grilles/registers/diffusers, building safety solutions, and high-performance specialty lubricants and sealants. The company operates in three segments: Contractor Solutions, Specialized Reliability Solutions, and Engineered Building Solutions. Products are sold through wholesale distribution networks to professional trades and end-users in over 100 countries.
sellsTo: Architecturally-specified building product specifiers and installers
General industrial maintenance and repair operations

exposures.sentence: Cybersecurity breaches and other disruptions to our information technology systems could compromise our information, disrupt our operations, and expose us to liability, which may adversely impact our operations.
Recent technological advances in artificial intelligence ( AI ) and machine-learning technology both present opportunities and pose risks to us.
Climate change could have an adverse effect on our business.
Our capital expenditures have been focused on continuous improvement and automation, safety enhancements, capacity expansion, enterprise resource planning systems and new product introductions.
We provide market-leading lubricants to open gears used in large mining excavation equipment, primarily through direct sales agents, as well as a network of strategic distributors.
We provide market-leading lubricants and anti-seize compounds, as well as greases, for use in oilfield drilling activity and maintenance of oilfield drilling and valve related equipment.

We provide an extensive array of products for installation, repair and maintenance of HVAC/R systems that includes condensate switches, pans and pumps, GRD, refrigerant caps, line set covers and other chemical and mechanical products.

Our Engineered Building Solutions segment provides primarily code-driven, life-safety products that are engineered to provide aesthetically-pleasing solutions for the construction, refurbishment and modernization of commercial, institutional and multi-family residential buildings.

Our products include mechanical products for heating, ventilation, air conditioning and refrigeration ("HVAC/R"), plumbing products, grilles, registers and diffusers ("GRD"), building safety solutions and high-performance specialty lubricants and sealants.
We provide products for electrical wire installation such as wire pulling tools, accessories and cleaners as well as surge protection and load management products.

catalysts.event: Quarterly dividend increased to $0.30 per share, paid on May 8, 2026
catalysts.sentence: On April 2, 2026, we announced a quarterly dividend increase to $0.30 per share, which was paid on May 8, 2026 to shareholders of record as of April 24, 2026.
Our Board of Directors has established an expiration of December 31, 2026 for the current $250.0 million repurchase program
